risk_specification.name: Comprehensive Business Risk Specification
risk_specification.description: Complete risk rules covering all attack patterns from GROOVE model files

rules.title: Phishing Attack on Active Email Account
rules.description: A phishing email is sent to an active user email account attempting to trick the user into entering credentials
postconditions: Attacker may gain access to user credentials or trigger alerts

outcomes.name: User clicked link and entered credentials
User clicked link but did not enter credentials
User ignored the email
User reported the phishing attempt

rules.title: Privilege Escalation via Writable Sensitive File
rules.description: A compromised user account has write access to a sensitive file and attempts to escalate privileges
preconditions: Sensitive file is writable by the user
postconditions: Attacker may gain elevated privileges or trigger alerts

attack_rate.scope: per user account with writable sensitive file

outcomes.name: Attacker successfully modifies file to escalate privileges
Attack attempt triggers security alert by file integrity monitoring
Sysadmin detects and revokes file permissions before attack succeeds

rules.title: Credential Dumping from Compromised Host
rules.description: An attacker with access to a compromised host attempts to dump stored credentials
preconditions: Credentials are stored on the host
postconditions: Attacker may obtain additional credentials or trigger detection

attack_rate.scope: per compromised host with stored credentials

outcomes.name: Attacker dumps admin credentials
Endpoint security detected the attempt
Partial credentials are obtained
Attempt failed silently

rules.title: Unauthorized Script Execution
rules.description: An attacker executes malicious scripts on a compromised host
preconditions: Server allows script execution from a compromised account
postconditions: Malicious script may execute or be detected

attack_rate.scope: per compromised host with script execution enabled

outcomes.name: Script is executed successfully
Script detected during execution by antivirus
Attack attempt triggers security alert
Script execution failed silently

rules.title: Remote Service Exploitation via RDP
rules.description: An attacker attempts to exploit remote desktop services to gain unauthorized access
postconditions: Attacker may gain remote access or trigger alerts

outcomes.name: Attacker logged in via RDP and gained control
Multiple failed RDP login attempts - security alert triggered and RDP port closed
RDP login attempt failed without detection

rules.title: Lateral Movement via Pass-the-Hash
rules.description: An attacker uses compromised NTLM hashes to authenticate to other systems

attack_rate.scope: per compromised host with stored hashes

outcomes.name: Attacker successfully authenticated using NTLM hash and compromised host
Suspicious login attempt detected and flagged
Authentication attempt failed and remained undetected

rules.title: Exploitation via Malicious USB Device
rules.description: A malicious USB device is inserted into an internal host, executing payloads automatically (USB drop attack).
preconditions: User has physical access to device
postconditions: System may be compromised with persistent backdoor or attack may be contained

outcomes.name: USB device successfully executes payload and establishes persistence
USB Device was removed before execution
Payload executed but user account is not compromised
Antivirus detected and blocked the payload execution

rules.title: Ransomware Deployment
rules.description: An attacker deploys ransomware to encrypt files and demand ransom
postconditions: Files may be encrypted or attack may be mitigated

attack_rate.scope: per compromised host with accessible files

outcomes.name: Attacker encrypted the file and demanded ransom for decryption
Security alert triggered and file permission revoked before encryption
Files restored from backup, permission revoked and user account recovered
Attack failed silently

rules.title: Trusted Relationship Abuse
rules.description: An attacker abuses trusted relationships to gain unauthorized access to sensitive resources
postconditions: Sensitive data may be accessed or alerts triggered

attack_rate.scope: per trusted relationship with sensitive access

outcomes.name: Attacker user abuses trust and gains access to sensitive file to extract data
Suspicious activity detected and alert triggered
Attack failed silently

rules.title: Denial of Service Attack
rules.description: An attacker attempts to make a service unavailable to legitimate users
preconditions: Target service is exposed to the network
Attacker has sufficient resources to generate high traffic
No effective rate-limiting or DoS protection in place
postconditions: Users experience downtime or slow response
Potential collateral impact on other services or hosts

outcomes.name: Service unavailable
Attack detected and mitigated
Attacker degrades the service partially
Attack failed silently
